achievements.title: Core Product
achievements.description: I build and maintain the company's main product website — Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind, fully responsive and SEO-optimized. On the same product I built the frontend platform: MongoDB handles the data, Azure Media Services handles video streaming.

achievements.title: Custom CMS
achievements.description: I also built a custom CMS from scratch so the non-technical team can publish blog posts and manage SEO metadata without touching code. And I wrote the REST APIs that feed into n8n workflows for automated content distribution — cuts out a lot of manual work.

achievements.title: Day to day
achievements.description: Agile, Git, GitHub, code reviews, continuous deployment.

achievements.title: Frontend
achievements.description: Built React components in TypeScript and Tailwind, wired up to REST APIs via NodeJS. Delivered 50+ features across Agile sprints. Deployment time dropped 90% after we set up proper CI/CD pipelines.

achievements.title: Performance Tracking
achievements.description: Performance optimization with Chrome DevTools got us a 20% speed improvement. Wrote Jest unit tests across the codebase. Translated Figma designs into accessible, reusable components — 100% cross-device.

projectsData.title: Decentralized Crowdfunding Platform
description: A solo project. I built the full frontend for a blockchain-integrated crowdfunding app — MetaMask wallet connection via Ethers.js, real-time Firebase Firestore sync for dashboards, 40% performance gains from query optimization. Works across every device and browser.
Found cross-browser UI issues during testing and fixed them with Chrome DevTools — compatibility problems cut by 25%.
Stats: 40% faster · 100% cross-device · 25% fewer compat. bugs

projectsData.title: Smart Weather Forecast App with AI Assistant
description: A weather app with an AI chat layer on top. Pulls live data from OpenWeatherMap, caches recent searches in localStorage, and uses Meta LLaMA 3.3 via OpenRouter for contextual weather summaries and Q&A.
95 Lighthouse score. API response time cut 30% after Axios call optimization and proper caching. All AI responses validated with Postman — 100% reliability.
Stats: 95 Lighthouse · 30% faster API · 100% AI reliability
